//: Staged for the future standalone repo (see ../SPLIT-PLAN.md). Not consumed yet — today the monorepo root package.json + relative imports are authoritative. The exports/files maps below are live-ready so consumers can resolve batch's docs + modules from the installed package (e.g. import.meta.resolve('@tjakoen/batch/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md')), which is how the portfolio renders /batch/docs without copying files. Root '.' entry (the TS composition surface) is added at extraction.
name: @tjakoen/batch
description: BATCH — a no-build, server-rendered hypermedia substrate (Bun · Addressable · TypeScript · CSS · htmx).
author: Tjakoen Stolk <tjakoen.s@gmail.com> (https://tjakoen.github.io)
